basic_details.job_title: IPC Scientific Assistant Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
basic_details.short_information: Indian Pharmacopoeia Commission (IPC) Scientific Assistant Notification 2026 has been released on the official website ipc.gov.in. A total of 4 vacancies have been announced through the IPC Scientific Assistant Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 35 years. Age relaxation as per Govt. Norms.

qualification.details: Post Graduate degree in Pharmaceutical Sciences/Bio-Chemistry/Biotechnology/Chemistry/Pharmacology/Microbiology from a recognized University or equivalent Associate-ship diploma of the Institution of Chemists (India). One year experience in Chemical/Physio-chemical testing & analysis of drugs in drugs testing laboratory under the Drugs and Cosmetics Act and Rules. Desirable: Good knowledge of computer application.

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for IPC Scientific Assistant Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: https://www.ipc.gov.in/career.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 13-07-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

all_official_links.label: Download IPC Scientific Assistant Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: IPC Scientific Assistant Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the IPC Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download IPC Scientific Assistant Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Post Graduate degree in Pharmaceutical Sciences/Bio-Chemistry/Biotechnology/Chemistry/Pharmacology/Microbiology from a recognized University or equivalent Associate-ship diploma of the Institution of Chemists (India). One year experience in Chemical/Physio-chemical testing & analysis of drugs in drugs testing laboratory under the Drugs and Cosmetics Act and Rules. Desirable: Good knowledge of computer application.

content_sections.heading: Age Limit
content_sections.text: Maximum Age Limit: 35 years. Age relaxation as per Govt. Norms.

content_sections.heading: IPC Scientific Assistant Recruitment 2026 - Important Dates

rows.event: Last Date for receipt of application

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to apply for IPC Scientific Assistant Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before applying. Download the application form from the official website: https://www.ipc.gov.in/career. Fill the application form carefully with correct information. Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates. Check all details carefully before submission. Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed. Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 13-07-2026. Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

content_sections.heading: IPC Scientific Assistant Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the IPC Scientific Assistant recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application for the IPC Scientific Assistant posts is 13th July 2026. Ensure your application reaches the official address by this date.

faq.question: Q2. What are the educational qualifications required for the Scientific Assistant post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a Post Graduate degree in Pharmaceutical Sciences, Bio-Chemistry, Biotechnology, Chemistry, Pharmacology, or Microbiology from a recognized University. An equivalent Associate-ship diploma from the Institution of Chemists (India) is also accepted.

faq.question: Q3. Is there any work experience required for this post?
faq.answer: Yes, one year of experience in Chemical/Physio-chemical testing and analysis of drugs in a drugs testing laboratory under the Drugs and Cosmetics Act and Rules is required.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for the Scientific Assistant position?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Scientific Assistant post is 35 years. Age relaxation will be provided as per Government norms.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the Scientific Assistant role?
faq.answer: The selected candidates will receive a salary in the pay scale of Rs. 35,400 to Rs. 1,12,400 per month.

faq.question: Q6. How many vacancies are available for the Scientific Assistant post?
faq.answer: There are a total of 4 vacancies for the Scientific Assistant post in the Indian Pharmacopoeia Commission.

faq.question: Q7. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for this recruitment is Offline. Candidates need to send their application form to the official address.

faq.question: Q8. Is there any application fee for the IPC Scientific Assistant recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q9. Where is the Indian Pharmacopoeia Commission located?
faq.answer: The Indian Pharmacopoeia Commission is located in Ghaziabad, Uttar Pradesh, with the pincode 201002.

faq.question: Q10. What is the selection process for the Scientific Assistant posts?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Scientific Assistant posts will be through Direct Recruitment.
